Function.Name: WriteSourceSelect
Function.Desc: Selects the source of the image to be displayed.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadSourceSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the source of the image being displayed.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteSplashScreenSelect
Function.Desc: Writes the index of a splash screen stored in flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: SplashScreenIndex
Param.Desc: The splash screen index with 0 being the first splash screen.

Function.Name: ReadSplashScreenSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the index of a splash screen stored in flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: SplashScreenIndex
Param.Desc: The splash screen index with 0 being the first splash screen.

Function.Name: ReadSplashScreenHeader
Function.Desc: Read Splash screen header

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteDisplayImageOrientation
Function.Desc: Specifies the image orientation of the displayed image for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadDisplayImageOrientation
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the displayed image orientation function for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteDisplayImageCurtain
Function.Desc: Controls the display image curtain for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadDisplayImageCurtain
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the image curtain control function for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteImageFreeze
Function.Desc: Enables or disables the image freeze function for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadImageFreeze
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the image freeze function for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteThreeDControl
Function.Desc: Specifies the 3D frame dominance and reference polarity.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadThreeDControl
Function.Desc: Reads the 3D frame dominance and reference polarity.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteLookSelect
Function.Desc: Specifies the LOOK for the image on the display module. A LOOK typically specifies a target white point.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadLookSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the LOOK select command for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadSequenceHeaderAttributes
Function.Desc: Reads sequence header information for the active sequence of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteCmtSelect
Function.Desc: Specifies the Degamma/CMT LUT for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadCmtSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the selected Degamma/CMT LUT for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadDmdSequencerSyncMode
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the DMD sequencer sync mode function of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteExecuteFlashBatchFile
Function.Desc: Executes a flash batch file.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteThreeDReference
Function.Desc: Specifies the 3D reference, used to specify whether a frame of data contains left or right eye data.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteMirrorLock
Function.Desc: This command is used to lock/unlock the DMD interface for optical alignment.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadMirrorLock
Function.Desc: Reads the lock/unlock state of the DMD interface for optical alignment.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpdLinkConfiguration
Function.Desc: Specifies the FPD Link bit rate and pixel map mode.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFpdLinkConfiguration
Function.Desc: Reads the FPD Link bit rate and pixel map mode.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteVideoChromaChannelSwapSelect
Function.Desc: Specifies the chroma channel swap to be applied to an incoming YUV422 source.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadVideoChromaChannelSwapSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the chroma channel swap being applied to an incoming YUV22 source.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteLedOutputControlMethod
Function.Desc: Specifies the method for controlling the LED outputs for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadLedOutputControlMethod
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the LED output control method for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteRgbLedEnable
Function.Desc: Enables the LEDs for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadRgbLedEnable
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the LED enables for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteRgbLedCurrent
Function.Desc: Sets the current for the red, green, and blue LEDs of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadRgbLedCurrent
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the current for the red, green, and blue LEDs of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadCaicLedMaxAvailablePower
Function.Desc: Reads the specified maximum LED power allowed for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteRgbLedMaxCurrent
Function.Desc: Specifies the maximum LED current allowed for each LED in the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadRgbLedMaxCurrent
Function.Desc: Reads the specified maximum LED current allowed for each LED in the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadCaicRgbLedCurrent
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the current for the red, green, and blue LEDs of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteInputImageSize
Function.Desc: Specifies the active data size of the external input image.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadInputImageSize
Function.Desc: Reads the specified data size of the external input image.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFpgaVersion
Function.Desc: Read Fpga version

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaTestPatternSelect
Function.Desc: Selects a test pattern from the FPGA as the image source.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: PatternSelect
Param.Desc: Type of pattern to display.

Param.Name: Size
Param.Desc: Size of the pattern.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaSolidField
Function.Desc: Write Fpga solid field

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaGrid
Function.Desc: Write Fpga grid

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaHorizontalRamp
Function.Desc: Write Fpga horizontal ramp

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaVerticalRamp
Function.Desc: Write Fpga vertical ramp

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaCheckerboard
Function.Desc: Write Fpga checkerboard

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaHorizontalLines
Function.Desc: Write Fpga horizontal lines

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaVerticalLines
Function.Desc: Write Fpga vertical lines

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaDiagonalLines
Function.Desc: Write Fpga diagonal lines

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaActuatorCalibrationPattern
Function.Desc: Write Fpga actuator calibration pattern

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpga3DTestPattern
Function.Desc: Write Fpga 3D test pattern

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaColorBarTestPattern
Function.Desc: Write Fpga color bar test pattern

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFpgaFrameAndCrossTestPattern
Function.Desc: Write Fpga frame and cross test pattern

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFpgaTestPatternSelect
Function.Desc: Reads back the host-specified parameters for an FPGA test pattern.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: TestPatternBorder
Param.Desc: Enable white border around the test pattern.

Param.Name: PatternSelect
Param.Desc: Type of pattern to display.

Param.Name: Size
Param.Desc: Size of the pattern.

Function.Name: WriteParallelVideoControl
Function.Desc: Specifies the polarity of syncs and sampling edge of the pixel clock.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadParallelVideoControl
Function.Desc: Specifies the polarity of syncs and sampling edge of the pixel clock.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteExternalVideoSourceFormatSelect
Function.Desc: Specifies the external video data format.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadExternalVideoSourceFormatSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the external video data format.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFpgaStatus
Function.Desc: Read Fpga status

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorLatency
Function.Desc: Specifies the latency used for actuator calibration.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorLatency
Function.Desc: Reads the Actuator Latency.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorGain
Function.Desc: Specifies the Actuator Gain.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorGain
Function.Desc: Reads the Actuator Gain.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorSegmentLength
Function.Desc: Specifies the Actuator segment length. Range is 2 to 65535

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorSegmentLength
Function.Desc: Reads the Actuator segment length.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorSyncDelay
Function.Desc: Specifies the Actuator Sync Delay.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorSyncDelay
Function.Desc: Reads the Actuator Sync Delay.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorOffset
Function.Desc: Specifies the Actuator Offset (16 bits).

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorOffset
Function.Desc: Reads the Actuator Offset.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteLocalAreaBrightnessBoostControl
Function.Desc: Controls the local area brightness boost image processing functionality for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadLocalAreaBrightnessBoostControl
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the local area brightness boost image processing functionality for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteCaicImageProcessingControl
Function.Desc: Controls the CAIC functionality for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadCaicImageProcessingControl
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the CAIC functionality within the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteColorCoordinateAdjustmentControl
Function.Desc: Controls the CCA image processing functionality for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadColorCoordinateAdjustmentControl
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the CCA image processing within the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteKeystoneCorrectionControl
Function.Desc: Controls the keystone correction image processing functionality for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: AnchorControlSteps
Param.Desc: The range is 0 to 100.

Function.Name: ReadKeystoneCorrectionControl
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the keystone correction image processing within the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: AnchorControlSteps
Param.Desc: The range is 0 to 100.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorNumberOfSegments
Function.Desc: Specifies the Actuator Number of Segments. Range is 2 to 255

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorNumberOfSegments
Function.Desc: Reads the Actuator Number of Segments.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorConfigurationSelect
Function.Desc: Specifies which voice coil and which tilt axis orientation are to be configured by subsequent actuator commands.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorConfigurationSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the currently selected voice coil and axis as specified in the Write Actuator Configuration Select command.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorFixedOutputLevel
Function.Desc: Specifies the Fixed Output Level (8 bits).

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorFixedOutputLevel
Function.Desc: Reads the Fixed Output Level.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorClockStretch
Function.Desc: Specifies the Period Stretch applied to the Waveform Generator. Range is 0 to 7

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorClockStretch
Function.Desc: Reads the Period Stretch applied to the Waveform Generator.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorReferenceOutputLevel
Function.Desc: Specifies the Reference Output Level (8 bits).

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorReferenceOutputLevel
Function.Desc: Reads the Reference Output Level.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorOutputSelect
Function.Desc: Specifies the actuator output.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorOutputSelect
Function.Desc: Reads the actuator output.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorEdgeTableAddressMode
Function.Desc: Specifies the edge table address mode.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorEdgeTableAddressMode
Function.Desc: Reads the edge table address mode.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteActuatorDacOutputEnable
Function.Desc: Enables the actuator DAC output.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadActuatorDacOutputEnable
Function.Desc: Reads the enable state of the actuator DAC output.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteBorderColor
Function.Desc: Specifies the on screen border color for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadBorderColor
Function.Desc: Reads the state of the on screen border color for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadAutoFramingInformation
Function.Desc: Reads VSYNC rate, total pixel, and total lines for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteKeystoneProjectionPitchAngle
Function.Desc: Specifies the projection pitch angle for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: PitchAngle
Param.Desc: The range is -40 to 40.

Function.Name: ReadKeystoneProjectionPitchAngle
Function.Desc: Reads the specified projection pitch angle for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Param.Name: PitchAngle
Param.Desc: The range is -40 to 40.

Function.Name: ReadShortStatus
Function.Desc: Provides a short system status for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadSystemStatus
Function.Desc: Reads system status information for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadSystemSoftwareVersion
Function.Desc: Reads the main application software version information for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadCommunicationStatus
Function.Desc: Reads communication status information for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadControllerDeviceId
Function.Desc: Reads the controller device ID for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadDmdDeviceId
Function.Desc: Reads the DMD device ID or DMD fuse data for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFirmwareBuildVersion
Function.Desc: Reads the controller firmware version for the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteDelay
Function.Desc: Delays for the specified number of microseconds.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFlashUpdatePrecheck
Function.Desc: Verifies that a pending flash update (write) is appropriate for the specified block of the display module flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFlashDataTypeSelect
Function.Desc: Selects the data block that will be written/read from the flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFlashDataLength
Function.Desc: Specifies the length in bytes of data that will be written/read from the flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFlashErase
Function.Desc: Erases the selected flash data.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFlashStart
Function.Desc: Writes data to the flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteFlashContinue
Function.Desc: Writes data to the flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFlashStart
Function.Desc: Reads data from the flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadFlashContinue
Function.Desc: Reads data from the flash.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteInternalRegisterAddress
Function.Desc: Specifies the address of an internal register in the display module. This command is sent before a register read/write.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteInternalRegister
Function.Desc: Writes data to an internal register of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadInternalRegister
Function.Desc: Reads data from an internal register of the display module.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: WriteXprFpgaRegister
Function.Desc: Writes to an FPGA register.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Function.Name: ReadXprFpgaRegister
Function.Desc: Reads from an FPGA register.

Param.Name: Summary
Param.Desc: Status and summary of command execution.

Member.Name: RisingEdgeReadUpFallingEdgeReadDown
Member.Desc: Rising Edge->Read Up, Falling Edge->Read Down

Member.Name: RisingEdgeReadUpFallingEdgeReadUpInverted
Member.Desc: Rising Edge->Read Up, Falling Edge->Read Up Inverted

Member.Name: RisingEdgeReadDownFallingEdgeReadUp
Member.Desc: Rising Edge->Read Down, Falling Edge->Read Up

Member.Name: RisingEdgeReadUpInvertedFallingEdgeReadUp
Member.Desc: Rising Edge->Read Up Inverted, Falling Edge->Read Up

Member.Name: Command
Member.Desc: Defined by the border color command

Member.Name: EntireFlashNoOem
Member.Desc: Entire Flash except OEM Calibration and Scratchpad Data

Member.Name: Manual
Member.Desc: Enabled: Manual strength control (no light sensor)

Member.Name: Automatic
Member.Desc: Enabled: Automatic strength control (uses light sensor)

Member.Name: Manual
Member.Desc: Manual RGB LED currents (disables CAIC algorithm)

Member.Name: Automatic
Member.Desc: CAIC (automatic) RGB LED power (enables CAIC algorithm)

Member.Name: DmdInterfaceUnlockDelay100MsDmdInterfaceLock
Member.Desc: DMD Interface Unlock, delay 100ms, DMD Interface Lock

Member.Name: Successful
Member.Desc: A boolean value indicating if the command execution was successful.
